text.en: In the Navamsa (D-9) chart, your Lagna lord Sun falls in the 1st house counted from the Navamsa's own Ascendant. Since the D-9 chart reveals the deeper, destined strength behind what the Rashi (D-1) chart promises, this shows that your inner personality and readiness for partnership draw hidden strength from self, personality, physical vitality, and overall approach to life, particularly regarding how your own personality, self-confidence, and readiness for commitment shape your approach to marriage and partnership. This is a Kendra/Trikona (angular or trinal) placement - one of the strongest positions in the chart. It gives a direct, visible, and relatively stable and happy marriage, and this factor should be treated as a major pillar of strength in your married life. This reflects how sustainable and deeply-rooted your core relational nature really is, beyond surface appearances.

Since the D-9 chart reveals the deeper, destined strength behind what the Rashi (D-1) chart promises, this shows that your inner personality and readiness for partnership draw hidden strength from fortune, dharma, philosophy, and long-distance/foreign connections, particularly regarding the spouse's luck and moral compass, blessings from father-in-law/elders, and possibly a foreign or long-distance connection with the partner. This is a Kendra/Trikona (angular or trinal) placement - one of the strongest positions in the chart. It gives a direct, visible, and relatively stable and happy marriage, and this factor should be treated as a major pillar of strength in your married life. This reflects how sustainable and deeply-rooted your core relational nature really is, beyond surface appearances.

Since the D-9 chart reveals the deeper, destined strength behind what the Rashi (D-1) chart promises, this shows that your inner personality and readiness for partnership draw hidden strength from comfort, home, vehicles, and emotional/domestic foundation, particularly regarding domestic peace, emotional security, and overall comfort and happiness within married life. This is a Kendra/Trikona (angular or trinal) placement - one of the strongest positions in the chart. It gives a direct, visible, and relatively stable and happy marriage, and this factor should be treated as a major pillar of strength in your married life. This reflects how sustainable and deeply-rooted your core relational nature really is, beyond surface appearances.

text.hi: नवांश (डी-9) कुंडली में, आपका लग्नेश शनि (Shani) नवांश के अपने लग्न से गिनने पर 12वें भाव में पड़ता है। चूंकि डी-9 कुंडली राशि (डी-1) कुंडली द्वारा दिए गए वादों के पीछे की गहरी, नियति-निर्धारित शक्ति को दर्शाती है, यह बताता है कि आपका आंतरिक व्यक्तित्व और साझेदारी के लिए तत्परता विदेश, व्यय, एकांत और आध्यात्म से छिपी हुई शक्ति प्राप्त करती है, विशेष रूप से शय्या सुख और शारीरिक अंतरंगता, साथी के साथ संभावित विदेश निवास, अलगाव की अवधि, या परिवार-संबंधी व्यय के संबंध में। यह एक दुःस्थान (चुनौतीपूर्ण) स्थान है। इसमें विवाह से जुड़ी देरी, मतभेद, स्वास्थ्य चिंताएँ या अपरंपरागत परिस्थितियाँ आ सकती हैं - परन्तु प्रारंभिक बाधाओं को पार करने के बाद यह प्रायः गहराई, रूपांतरण या असामान्य/विदेशी संबंधों को एक अप्रत्याशित रूप से मज़बूत बंधन से पुरस्कृत करता है। यह दर्शाता है कि सतही दिखावे से परे, आपका मूल संबंध-स्वभाव वास्तव में कितना स्थायी और गहराई से जड़ें जमाए हुए है।
